title: No reds for mouth covering in Champions League
summary: Players will not face red cards for covering their mouths while speaking to opponents in UEFA competitions, the governing body confirmed. This clarification affects match discipline protocols in European club football.
content: Players will not be sent off for covering their mouths when speaking to an opponent in UEFA competitions, the governing body confirmed.

zh.title: 欧冠中遮住嘴巴不会被罚红牌
zh.summary: 欧足联确认，球员在欧洲比赛中与对手交谈时遮住嘴巴不会面临红牌处罚。这一澄清影响了欧洲俱乐部足球的比赛纪律规则。

title: England's Stanway joins Arsenal on free transfer
summary: Arsenal have signed England midfielder Georgia Stanway on a free transfer. The acquisition strengthens Arsenal's midfield options ahead of the upcoming season.
content: Arsenal have announced the signing of England midfielder Georgia Stanway on a free transfer.

zh.title: 英格兰中场斯坦威以自由身加盟阿森纳
zh.summary: 阿森纳以自由身签约英格兰中场乔治亚·斯坦威。这笔引援强化了阿森纳在新赛季的中场阵容。

title: Portugal, Ronaldo survive late scare from Croatia
summary: Portugal defeated Croatia 2-1 in a World Cup match with Gonçalo Ramos scoring the decisive stoppage-time goal, while Cristiano Ronaldo converted a penalty from the bench. The victory eliminates Croatia and advances Portugal to the Round of 16.
content: Gonçalo Ramos headed in a pass from Rafael Leão in stoppage time as Cristiano Ronaldo, who had earlier converted a penalty kick, watched from the bench while Portugal defeated Croatia 2-1 on Thursday, ending Luka Modrić's fifth bid for a World Cup.

zh.title: 葡萄牙和罗纳尔多战胜克罗地亚惊险出线
zh.summary: 葡萄牙在世界杯比赛中2-1战胜克罗地亚，贡萨洛·拉莫斯打入伤停补时阶段的决胜球，克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多从替补席罚进一粒点球。此胜利淘汰克罗地亚，使葡萄牙晋级16强。

title: Ronaldo pays 'special' tribute to Jota after WC wi...
summary: Cristiano Ronaldo and Portugal paid an emotional tribute to former teammate Diogo Jota following their 2-1 World Cup victory over Croatia. The tribute reflected the squad's connection and acknowledged Jota's absence from the tournament.
content: Cristiano Ronaldo and Portugal paid an emotional tribute to former teammate Diogo Jota after their 2-1 World Cup win over Croatia in Toronto on Thursday.

zh.title: 罗纳尔多在世界杯胜利后向若塔致敬
zh.summary: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多和葡萄牙在战胜克罗地亚2-1后，对前队友迪奥戈·若塔进行了感人的致敬。这个致敬反映了球队的联系，并表达了对若塔缺席本赛事的认可。

title: Sources: USMNT cannot appeal Balogun red card
summary: The USMNT has no avenue to appeal Folarin Balogun's red card from the Bosnia and Herzegovina match, with sources indicating he faces a potential extended suspension. The decision eliminates the team's ability to contest the disciplinary action.
content: The USMNT has no route to appeal Folarin Balogun's red card against Bosnia and Herzegovina, sources have told ESPN, and he could face an extended ban.

zh.title: 消息称美国男足无法申诉巴洛贡的红牌
zh.summary: 美国男足队无法对巴洛贡在与波黑比赛中获得的红牌进行申诉，消息称他可能面临更长的禁赛期。这一判罚消除了球队对纪律处罚进行上诉的可能性。

title: Switzerland eliminate Algeria to progress to R16
summary: Switzerland defeated Algeria 2-1 to advance to the Round of 16, with goals from Breel Embolo and Dan Ndoye. The victory marks a successful group stage campaign for the Swiss.
content: Breel Embolo and Dan Ndoye both scored and Switzerland advanced to the Round of 16.

zh.title: 瑞士击败阿尔及利亚晋级16强
zh.summary: 瑞士以2-1击败阿尔及利亚晋级16强，进球来自布雷尔·恩博洛和丹·恩多耶。这场胜利标志着瑞士小组赛阶段的成功。

title: After Spain win, Yamal says 'World Cup starts now'...
summary: Barcelona midfielder Lamine Yamal delivered a standout performance in Spain's 3-0 victory over Austria, earning match MVP honors. His performance underscores Spain's renewed momentum as the tournament progresses.
content: Lamine Yamal said "the World Cup starts now" after shining in Spain's 3-0 win over Austria at SoFi Stadium, with the Barcelona star being named the game's MVP.

zh.title: 西班牙胜利后，亚马尔说"世界杯现在开始"
zh.summary: 巴塞罗那中场球员拉敏·亚马尔在西班牙3-0击败奥地利的比赛中表现出色，荣获本场最佳球员奖。他的表现突显了西班牙在赛事进行中重获的势头。

title: Madrid deny interest in signing Enzo Fernández
summary: Real Madrid have publicly denied any interest in signing Chelsea midfielder Enzo Fernández and stated they have no intention to pursue him. The statement counters recent transfer speculation linking the Spanish club to the Argentine player.
content: Real Madrid have stated they have not registered any interest in signing Enzo Fernández from Chelsea and have no intention to do so in the future.

zh.title: 马德里否认有兴趣签下恩佐·费尔南德斯
zh.summary: 皇家马德里公开否认有兴趣签下切尔西中场球员恩佐·费尔南德斯，并表示无意追求他。该声明反驳了最近将这家西班牙俱乐部与这位阿根廷球员联系起来的转会传言。

title: Spain finally have World Cup mojo back with first ...
summary: Spain defeated Austria 3-0, achieving their first knockout-stage victory since winning the 2010 World Cup. The breakthrough win ends a 16-year drought in elimination-stage matches at World Cups.
content: Heading into the World Cup, Spain's record since their 2010 triumph was three tournaments, zero knockout wins. But after beating Austria 3-0, they're back in business.

zh.title: 西班牙终于重获世界杯气势
zh.summary: 西班牙3-0击败奥地利，实现了自2010年赢得世界杯以来首次在淘汰赛阶段取胜。这场突破性胜利结束了西班牙在世界杯淘汰赛中长达16年的干旱。

title: Tuchel wants young England fans to stay up for 1am World Cup clash - but should they?
summary: England's must-win World Cup match against Mexico kicks off at 01:00 BST on Monday, creating scheduling challenges for young supporters. The article examines whether children should stay awake for the late-night fixture.
content: England's must-win match against Mexico kicks off at 01:00 BST on Monday - disco naps and spoiler-free recaps may be needed.

zh.title: 图赫尔希望英格兰年轻球迷坚持看凌晨1点世界杯比赛 - 但他们应该吗？
zh.summary: 英格兰与墨西哥的世界杯生死之战将在周一格林威治标准时间凌晨1点开踢，对年轻球迷的时间安排造成了挑战。文章探讨了儿童是否应该为这场深夜比赛熬夜观看。

title: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal eye £130m move  for...
summary: Arsenal are pursuing Aston Villa defender Ezri Konsa and forward Morgan Rogers in potential moves valued around £130 million. The transfers would strengthen Arsenal's roster depth across defensive and attacking positions.
content: Arsenal are looking at signing Aston Villa defender Ezri Konsa as well as forward Morgan Rogers. Transfer Talk has the latest.

zh.title: 转会流言、新闻：阿森纳看中1.3亿英镑的转会
zh.summary: 阿森纳正在追逐阿斯顿维拉后卫埃兹里·孔萨和前锋摩根·罗杰斯，这两笔转会的总价值约为1.3亿英镑。这些转会将增强阿森纳在防线和锋线上的深度。

title: Mahrez retires from Algeria duty after World Cup exit
summary: Algeria captain Riyad Mahrez announced his retirement from international football after the team's 2-0 loss to Switzerland in the World Cup Round of 32. The retirement concludes his national team career following the tournament exit.
content: Algeria captain Riyad Mahrez announces his retirement from international football after the Desert Foxes’ 2-0 defeat by Switzerland in the World Cup round of 32.

zh.title: 马赫雷斯世界杯后宣布退出阿尔及利亚国家队
zh.summary: 阿尔及利亚队长里亚德·马赫雷斯在球队在世界杯32强赛中以0:2不敌瑞士后宣布退出国际足球。这次退役标志着他在国家队的职业生涯随着赛事的出局而结束。

title: World Cup Daily live: Travel chaos sees Speed miss...
summary: The final day of the Round of 32 at the 2026 FIFA World Cup determines the last three qualifying spots for the Round of 16. Travel disruptions are affecting participants during the tournament.
content: It's the final day of the round of 32 at the 2026 FIFA World Cup as we decide the final three spots for the round of 16.

zh.title: 世界杯每日直播：旅行混乱导致Speed缺席...
zh.summary: 2026年国际足联世界杯32强赛的最后一天决定了进入16强的最后三个席位。旅行中断正在影响赛事期间的参赛者。

title: Portugal snatch victory without Ronaldo, but more ...
summary: Portugal advanced to the Round of 16 with a dramatic victory over Croatia, with Cristiano Ronaldo watching from the bench. The team now faces Spain in a significant matchup in the knockout stages.
content: Portugal's dramatic win over Croatia has allowed them to advance to the last 16 of the World Cup, but they face an even bigger test in a matchup with Spain.

zh.title: 葡萄牙在没有罗纳尔多的情况下抢得胜利，但更多...
zh.summary: 葡萄牙在与克罗地亚的戏剧性胜利中晋级16强，克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多从替补席观看比赛。该球队现在在淘汰赛中面临与西班牙的重要比赛。

title: VAR review: Why were Croatia denied an equalizer d...
summary: A VAR review examined a controversial decision that denied Croatia an equalizer during their World Cup match. The incident highlights contentious refereeing moments under video review during tournament play.

zh.title: VAR审查：克罗地亚为什么被拒绝进球...
zh.summary: VAR审查审视了一个有争议的判罚，该判罚在世界杯比赛中拒绝了克罗地亚的进球。该事件突出了视频审查期间比赛中有争议的裁判时刻。

title: Portugal through to last 16 after dramatic victory over Croatia
summary: Portugal defeated Croatia 2-1 in a chaotic second-half match in Toronto, with goals from Cristiano Ronaldo and Goncalo Ramos, securing advancement to the World Cup last 16. They will face fellow Iberian rivals Spain in the knockout round.
content: Portugal beat Croatia 2-1 with goals from Cristiano Ronaldo and Goncalo Ramos after a chaotic second-half in Toronto to set up a last 16 tie with Iberian rivals Spain.

zh.title: 葡萄牙战胜克罗地亚后晋级16强
zh.summary: 葡萄牙在多伦多的混乱下半场比赛中以2-1战胜克罗地亚，克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多和贡萨洛·拉莫斯进球，确保晋级世界杯16强。他们将在淘汰赛中面对伊比利亚半岛的宿敌西班牙。

title: Late VAR drama as Croatia denied equaliser
summary: Croatia's Josko Gvardiol was denied an equaliser against Portugal when his stoppage-time goal was ruled out for offside following a VAR review in their World Cup round of 32 match in Toronto.
content: Josko Gvardiol's stoppage-time goal is ruled out for offside after a VAR review, denying Croatia an equaliser against Portugal in their World Cup knockout match in Toronto.

zh.title: VAR深夜戏剧，克罗地亚被拒扳平
zh.summary: 在多伦多举行的世界杯第32轮比赛中，克罗地亚的约什科·瓜瓦迪奥尔的伤停补时进球因VAR审查被判越位，被拒绝与葡萄牙扳平。

title: Ronaldo levels from penalty spot for Portugal
summary: Portugal captain Cristiano Ronaldo equalized against Croatia from the penalty spot during their World Cup round of 32 match in Toronto.
content: Portugal captain Cristiano Ronaldo draws his side level from the penalty spot against Croatia during their round of 32 game in Toronto.

zh.title: 罗纳尔多点球为葡萄牙扳平
zh.summary: 在多伦多举行的世界杯第32轮比赛中，葡萄牙队长克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多从点球为球队扳平克罗地亚。

title: Ronaldo has equaliser ruled out for offside
summary: Cristiano Ronaldo had an equalising goal disallowed for offside during Portugal's round of 32 World Cup match against Croatia in Toronto.
content: Cristiano Ronaldo has an equalising goal ruled out for offside during Portugal's round of 32 game with Croatia in Toronto.

zh.title: 罗纳尔多进球因越位被判无效
zh.summary: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多在葡萄牙与克罗地亚在多伦多进行的世界杯32强比赛中打入的扳平进球因越位被判无效。
